name: AACOM Vegas 2026
description: AACOM Annual Conference — largest gathering of osteopathic medical educators. Dr. Warren's opportunity to reconnect with Nevada-based alumni, recruit dinner attendees, and strengthen COMP's alumni network presence in the Vegas metro.

checklist.task: Review list — flag top 20 priority reconnections
Review and send personalized invitations to priority alumni
Personal follow-up with VIPs who haven't responded
Review intel brief and talking points
Post-dinner debrief — note new contacts, follow-up promises, next steps
Send bulk invitations to non-priority alumni
Finalize headcount and send to venue
Print name badges and prep welcome packets

outreach_template.subject: COMP Alumni Dinner at AACOM Vegas — You're Invited
outreach_template.body:
Hi Dr. {{last_name}},

I wanted to reach out because we're hosting an alumni dinner during the AACOM conference in Las Vegas, and as a fellow COMP graduate practicing in Nevada, I'd love for you to be there.

Date: Wednesday, April 22, 2026
Venue: Caesars Palace
Time: 7:00 PM

Nothing formal — just good conversation, good company, and a chance to reconnect with fellow DOs and hear about where the college is headed.

I'd really enjoy catching up and hearing about your practice. Let me know if you can make it.

Warm regards,
Lisa Warren, DO, MBA
Dean, COMP & COMP-Northwest

brief:
## AACOM Vegas 2026 — Intel Brief

**Conference:** AACOM Annual Meeting, April 22–24, Caesars Palace, Las Vegas

**Our alumni in Nevada:** 168 COMP graduates practice in NV, with 134 in the Las Vegas metro area. Top specialties: Internal Medicine, Family Medicine, Emergency Medicine, Anesthesiology.

**Key talking points:**
- COMP's 2026 match rate and residency placement stats
- New simulation center opening
- Alumni mentorship program expansion
- SOAP support outcomes

**Priority reconnections:**
- Alumni who haven't been contacted in 2+ years
- High-engagement alumni (mentors, donors, preceptors) for recognition
- Notable alumni for potential guest speaker invitations

**Goal:** Secure 15–20 attendees for the alumni dinner. Reactivate dormant relationships. Identify 3–5 new mentors or advisory board candidates.
